operational_knowledge_units.title: Flatlined heartbeat may indicate Ignition started after WCS and OptiSweep requires restart
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that if the heartbeat is flatlined, Ignition probably started later than WCS, and the OptiSweep service needs to be restarted.
observed_evidence: Visible text: 'If the heartbeat is flat lined Igniton probably came up later then wcs and the service OptiSweep needs to be restarted'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Unplanned restart diagnostic: if the heartbeat is flatlined, Ignition may have come up later than WCS, and the OptiSweep service needs to be restarted.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Restart OptiSweep service when heartbeat is flatlined after startup order issue
preconditions: Heartbeat is observed to be flatlined
Possible condition noted by slide: Ignition came up later than WCS
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide states that if the heartbeat is flatlined, Ignition probably started later than WCS and OptiSweep needs to be restarted.

steps.instruction: Check whether the heartbeat is flatlined.
steps.expected_outcome: The heartbeat condition is confirmed as flatlined.

steps.instruction: If the heartbeat is flatlined, restart the OptiSweep service.
steps.expected_outcome: OptiSweep service is restarted in response to the flatlined heartbeat condition.
steps.validation_check: OptiSweep service restart has been performed; no further validation is stated on the slide.

warnings: The slide provides no exact restart sequence or interface details.
The statement that Ignition came up later than WCS is presented as a probable cause, not a confirmed diagnosis.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Service restart candidate: when heartbeat is flatlined, the slide indicates Ignition may have started after WCS and the OptiSweep service should be restarted.
